vocab.meaning: tuổi thơ vô tư lự, không lo âu
vocab.example: I was fortunate to have a carefree childhood where I could roam the neighborhood and have a walk whenever I pleased.

vocab.meaning: sự nuôi dưỡng/lớn lên ở vùng nông thôn
vocab.example: My rural upbringing meant that going for a walk involved crossing vast paddy fields rather than concrete pavements.

vocab.meaning: thời đại đã qua, thời kỳ dĩ vãng
vocab.example: Those evening walks now feel like a memory from a bygone era before smartphones dominated our lives.

vocab.meaning: giữa vòng tay thiên nhiên/được thiên nhiên bao bọc
vocab.example: As a child, I spent most of my time in the lap of nature, walking through local forests and learning about different plants.

vocab.meaning: năng lượng dồi dào, vô tận
vocab.example: Driven by boundless energy, I used to walk and run for hours without ever feeling a hint of fatigue.

vocab.meaning: con đường mòn có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father would take me along a scenic trail near the river, which was the highlight of my week.

vocab.meaning: sự ngạc nhiên, sự háo hức khám phá
vocab.example: Every walk I took as a young boy was filled with a sense of wonder at how big the world seemed.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần phiêu lưu/thích khám phá
vocab.example: My adventurous spirit often led me to walk much further than I was supposed to, exploring every nook and cranny of the village.

vocab.meaning: chuyến đi nhanh qua nhiều địa điểm
vocab.example: A simple walk with my friends often turned into a whistlestop tour of all the best fruit trees in the area.

vocab.meaning: trò giải trí/thói quen yêu thích
vocab.example: Exploring the outdoors on foot was a cherished pastime that defined my early years.
